meaning: n.试验,试用,尝试,预赛(试),预演
examples: The recycling programme gets its first tryout in Idaho.
Harry did not think he could stand another full-House tryout.
First, can I give a fair tryout indoors to players wishing to try out for the squad?
"I'm going to be doing a lot of practicing from now until the tryout, " she said.
These rookies have earned a tryout, just as I had at their age.
